name: passdown
description: Intake, dispatch, handoff, and pickup skills for multi-agent, multi-session work.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, delegate, and hand work between AI sessions.
interface.longDescription: Passdown turns captured ideas into plans, routes verifiable tasks to compatible executors, writes concise session handoffs, and picks the next session up from the latest handoff.
defaultPrompt: Process new notes from my passdown inbox.
Dispatch the next planned task safely.
Write a concise handoff for this session.
Pick up from the latest passdown.
